title: Duper Villager
description: A new profession for Villager is a cheater or a duper. I don't think I need to tell you what he sells.
body:
This mod will add a new profession for a villager and with the help of this profession you will be able to prank your friend because it is literally a dupe from nothing 

Crafting a profession block is quite difficult for a survivalist, but if you have full armor, this shouldn't be a problem for you.

I've attached some crafts and deals to the photo gallery.

The mod may not work on open LAN servers if you are not the host.

After several tests, it turned out that the mod can produce unexpected errors. If you find any, please report them to a1ex353@yandex.ru
